text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before a race, I find Air Groove quivering in the
waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You fool. Quite the contrary. I am absolutely
elated.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
After all, today I move one step closer to
becoming a model for Umamusume everywhere.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That goes without saying. Keep your eyes on the
Empress and witness my victory!
